project.name: rescatto-business-dashboard
project.description: Business dashboard for Rescatto app - food rescue & sustainability platform
project.architecture: SPA with Firebase backend, role-based routing (admin, business, customer, driver, backoffice)

patterns.testing: vitest for unit, playwright for e2e
patterns.ui: Tailwind CSS utility-first, custom components in /components/
patterns.ai: Gemini API (commented out), DeepSeek API via ai-router.ts

architecture_decisions.title: AI Router PRO→FLASH con DeepSeek
architecture_decisions.decision: Usar deepseek-v4-pro para planificación estratégica y deepseek-v4-flash para implementación
architecture_decisions.rationale: 90% ahorro de tokens vs usar pro siempre. Flash suficiente para implementación de tareas atómicas.

notes.graphify: graphify-out/ no existe aún. Reglas en AGENTS.md preservadas.
notes.gemini_service: Comentado para evitar costos. Usar DeepSeek como alternativa.
